topic: What happens to your brain after 24 hours without sleep
caption: Did you know that after 24 hours without sleep, your brain's ability to process information decreases by 50%? 🤯 Sleep deprivation can have serious effects on your brain and body. Here are some key facts: 📝 1) Your reaction time slows down. 2) You're more prone to mood swings. 3) Your risk of chronic diseases increases. 💔 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💤 #SleepDeprivation #BrainHealth #MentalPerformance #Wellness #HealthTips #SleepIsKey #Neuroscience #CognitiveFunction
